MINI MINUTES:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE ISSUANCE OF PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION

Appearances:
Seth W. Wiener, Esq. of the LAW OFFICE OF SETH W. WIENER, Tel: 925.487.5607, for petitioner, via ZOOM videoconference;
Meera H. Bhatt, Esq., SF Deputy City Attorney, Tel: 415.554.4285, for respondent CCSF.

Hearing held. After hearing, the ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE ISSUANCE OF PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION is taken under submission by the court.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/RBU)

*********************************************************************************************

After considering oral arguments, the court ruled on APPLICATION FOR ISSUANCE OF PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION - DENIED. Order signed. (302/RBU)
